subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-03 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: Man must be known through his deeds and actions. Mere words have no weight. The Persian Nationalists have loved to theorize on certain Democratic principles
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @stories; anecdotes, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @unity; oneness of humanity, @criticism and its limits, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @words vs deeds
